label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 1

extraction.one_line_summary: MILESI Lorenzo won Stage 1 TTT as DSM exploited early dry conditions before rain intensified, beating Movistar by 0.5s and benefiting from UAE/Jumbo crashes.
tactical_patterns: Early start order proved decisive: DSM rode on dry/evaporating tarmac before rain intensified for later favorites.
Soudal-QuickStep kept waiting for Evenepoel through standing water/darkness, showing defensive TTT philosophy over aggressive pacing.
UAE didn't wait for Almeida after crash, revealing team hierarchy below GC leader in opening TTT.

rider_signals.ALMEIDA Xiao: negative: UAE left him after bike change, signaling he's not the protected GC rider
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: Soudal waited through darkness/water but his post-race anger suggests mental vulnerability to adverse conditions
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: Jumbo-Visma lost 32s waiting for hobbled teammates, exposing TTT depth issues
rider_signals.MILESI Lorenzo: positive: DSM gave him leader jersey over Ganna, indicating possible stage-racing role expansion
